rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §13.203 governs election procedure for abolishing an independent school district. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 13.203. ELECTION. (a) Each county judge receiving a valid petition shall:
_note: Rule text concerns school district abolition elections; no overlap with proposed homestead exemption increase.
